prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MGA-BTOP-ROLL-1 Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio DIY Roller Coaster Monorail Bullet Train Playset, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Fasten those seat belts and get ready to ride, because this roller coaster is on a straight track to fun. Fun sound effects, lights, 360 degree turns and looping automatically on the track (x3 AAA batteries needed), kids will love being the conductor of their very own high speed bullet train.

This complete DIY monorail train set features a 112 piece track system that comes with three sleek and realistic looking battery operated bullet trains; with its colorful railway tracks and easy to snap together pieces, building their roller coaster track system is half the fun. The monorail train set bullet train is a fun project for kids to do with friends or family. And, as an early STEM educational toy, the bullet train roller coaster toys from Kidplokio is ideal for improving, motor skills and hand eye coordination, while encouraging them to engage in problem solving and critical thinking skills. Kids will take pride in their accomplishment of building their very own roller coaster.

This sturdy, safe, non toxic roller coaster playset is made of high quality materials that can withstand hours of playtime. Kids will have endless fun watching their monorail zoom up, down and upside down through the colorful track; this playset is packed with all you need to experience a wild ride right in your living room for hours of fun. Search Terms: Toys for boys Christmas Hanukkah brother gifts stocking stuffers roller coaster monorail train fine motor skills toys for 3 year old toddler learning activities birthday present DIY pretend play cosplay engineer architect educational games model Features: - KIDS ROLLER COASTER TOY: If you have little builders in your house, they'll love this DIY roller coaster toys playset! When assembled, this 112 piece battery operated monorail train set railway track system features x3 realistic bullet train cars that run on their own with cool sound effects and 360 degree loops! - AWESOME SOUND EFFECTS AND LIGHTS: The bullet train monorail roller coaster provides hours of entertainment in both the construction process and during assembled playtime; with realistic sound effects and lights, kids will love directing the bullet train, becoming their own high speed bullet train conductor - EASY DIY ASSEMBLY: The colorful railway tracks easily snap together with floor stands and clips for a fun and easy kid's project with friends and family, no tools required (x3 AA batteries needed for bullet train but are not included with purchase) - STEM TOYS: As an early STEM educational toy, this monorail train set from Kidplokio is a great toy for improving fine motor skills, hand eye coordination, problem solving and critical thinking skills; little ones will take pride in their accomplishment of building their very own roller coaster! - SPECIFICATIONS: Package Dimensions: 20 x 11.5 x 2.5 inches; Weight: 2.15lbs; Color: Multi; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
